meaning: n.(可)扩大(或扩展、扩张、延伸、膨胀)性(或度)
examples: For foundry sand from a famous domestic area, the curve of thermal expansivity with the temperature was described.
The practical value of knowledge resources possesses popularity, duality of exhaustiveness and non exhaustiveness, and expansivity.
For each test series the samples were maintained according to its own maintaining method and the loss rate of quantity or length expansivity was measured in defined period.
